_comment: EventBridge rule - alternative trigger method. You can use EITHER S3 Event Notification (simpler) OR EventBridge (more flexible). See the deployment guide for which to choose.

EventBridgeRule.Name: nextflow-csv-upload-trigger
EventBridgeRule.Description: Triggers when a .csv file is uploaded to s3://seqwell-stepfunction/

_note_on_s3_eventbridge: For EventBridge to receive S3 events, you MUST enable S3 EventBridge notifications on the bucket. See the deployment guide Step 2.
